title: GetGenome: Overcoming inequalities in access to genomics technology.
author: Canham J Win J GetGenome Network Kamoun S
content: S-EPMC11357086 PMC11357086 GetGenome: Overcoming inequalities in access to genomics technology. Although genomics has become integral to life science research, inequitable access to genomics technology remains prevalent. GetGenome, a non-profit organization, aims to overcome this by providing
